response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed the video is a continuous loop or waiting screen with an image of ReGLOSS members. The text confirms the concert is 'ReGLOSS 1st Live Flashpoint'. 2. Identified the background music as the song 'Flashpoint' by ReGLOSS. 3. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics for 'Flashpoint' by ReGLOSS. 4. Successfully located the lyrics in both Japanese and English translation. 5. Compiled the scene information and lyrics into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A 4-minute video acting as an introductory or waiting screen for the ReGLOSS 1st Live concert titled 'Flashpoint'. The video features a static image of the four ReGLOSS members and continuously plays their original song 'Flashpoint' in the background.

scenes.description: The video functions as an introductory or on-hold screen for the ReGLOSS 1st Live concert, 'Flashpoint'. It features a still image of the ReGLOSS members throughout, with the song 'Flashpoint' by ReGLOSS playing in the background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Verse 1]
紙細工の花びらを
ある人は美しいとぼやいた
この地球の横顔は
どう見えてる？キミの世界では
現実を逆さまにして
失くしそうなモノだけ振り落とした ah
手のひらで拾い上げようとしたら
指の隙間すり抜け消えてった

[Pre-Chorus]
“形あるものだけが
すべてじゃないけど
形あるものが
どうしても欲しいよ”

[Chorus]
この世界を (da-ra-da)
変えることは (la-la-la-la)
きっとできないけど (da-ra-da)
キミの中の世界なら変えられるはず
芽吹いて 咲いて 実って 枯れて
何ひとつ欠かせないから (da-ra-da-da)
最後にキミが笑ってくれれば
もうそれだけでいい

[Verse 2]
言葉の綾を紡ぐ人 優しさを編む人
それぞれの正義を解ってあげたい
絡まった矛盾と辻褄合わせ
そんな刹那を抱え今日を生きてる
分け合った灯り 隣から隣へ
やがてひとつに 夜の帳へ
息を吹き込んだ
キミとじゃなきゃだめなんだ ah

[Pre-Chorus]
このまま寝てしまうには
もったいないほど
優しさに包まった
夜だった

[Bridge]
はっきり浮かび上がった 夢の輪郭
それは確かに愛だった
ツキが見守る今夜 そっと一瞬を抱き締めた
煌めく星 ooh
色や形 温度や意味
まるで何もかも違うボクらだけど
きっと最後には
この音で繋がってる

[Chorus]
この世界を (da-ra-da)
変えることは (la-la-la-la)
きっとできないけど (da-ra-da)
キミの中の世界なら変えられるはず
芽吹いて 咲いて 実って 枯れて
何ひとつ欠かせないから (da-ra-da-da)
最後にキミが笑ってくれれば
もうそれだけでいい

[Outro]
I'll always be by your side
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Verse 1]
Paper-crafted flower petals
Someone muttered were beautiful
This Earth's profile
How does it look? In your world
Turning reality upside down
I shook off only the things I was about to lose ah
When I tried to pick them up in my palm
They slipped through the gaps in my fingers and disappeared

[Pre-Chorus]
"Things with form are not
Everything, but
I want things with form
No matter what"

[Chorus]
This world (da-ra-da)
Changing it (la-la-la-la)
I surely cannot (da-ra-da)
But the world inside you, I should be able to change
Sprouting, blooming, bearing fruit, withering
Because none of it can be missing (da-ra-da-da)
If in the end you smile for me
That alone is enough

[Verse 2]
People who weave the nuances of words, people who knit kindness
I want to understand each other's justice
Tangled contradictions and making ends meet
Holding onto such moments, I live today
The shared light, from neighbor to neighbor
Eventually becoming one, beyond the veil of night
I breathed life into it
It has to be with you, ah

[Pre-Chorus]
To fall asleep just like this
It was a night
Wrapped in kindness
Too precious to waste

[Bridge]
The clearly emerged outline of a dream
That was certainly love
Tonight, watched over by the moon, I gently embraced the moment
A twinkling star ooh
Color and shape, temperature and meaning
Although we are completely different
Surely in the end
We are connected by this sound

[Chorus]
This world (da-ra-da)
Changing it (la-la-la-la)
I surely cannot (da-ra-da)
But the world inside you, I should be able to change
Sprouting, blooming, bearing fruit, withering
Because none of it can be missing (da-ra-da-da)
If in the end you smile for me
That alone is enough

[Outro]
I'll always be by your side
